visual: Steps forward in a bow stance while the arms separate diagonally, one hand rising to eye level and the other sweeping down past the hip, repeated left and right.
motion_description: From a starting position with weight on the back right leg, the right hand is held high near the chest while the left hand rests lower near the right hip. The practitioner steps forward with the left foot, planting the heel first, and slowly shifts their weight forward. As the torso rotates approximately 45 degrees to face forward, the arms separate in a steady, continuous motion: the left arm sweeps diagonally forward and upward to finish at chest height, while the right hand presses downward and back to rest near the hip.
